—We cannot emphasize enough how important it is to persuade people to live together in peace. It would be wonderful if we could say enough. Living peacefully benefits us, enhances our honor and comfort, and brings constant delight to those who are united. This pleasantness is like the holy anointing oil. It is the fruit of the Spirit, evidence of our union with Christ, and it beautifies his gospel. It is both profitable and pleasing; it brings blessings as numerous as drops of dew. It cools the intense heat of people's passions, just as dews cool the air and refresh the earth. It moistens the heart and prepares it to receive the good seed of the word and make it fruitful. See the proof of the excellence of brotherly love: when brothers live together in unity, the Lord commands a blessing. God commands a blessing; people can only ask for one. Believers who live in love and peace will have the God of love and peace with them now, and they will soon be with him forever, in a world of endless love and peace. May all who love the Lord overlook offenses and forgive one another, as God has forgiven them for Christ's sake.
